Description: Demonstrate BMad-driven modernization of a legacy RPG program into a system-aware interactive utility.
As a developer I want the program to automatically retrieve my IBM i User Profile from the system so that the interaction feels integrated.
Acceptance Criteria: GIVEN program is executed on PUB400; WHEN RPG cycle starts; THEN program retrieves USER from PSDS; AND displays System ID message.

Description: As a user I want to receive a personalized greeting and a random joke after providing my name so that the application provides immediate value.
Acceptance Criteria: GIVEN user has entered preferred name; WHEN DSPLY input is processed; THEN program displays Hi [Name]! [Random Joke]; AND joke is selected from 3 options.

Description: As a system administrator I want every program execution to be recorded in a persistent log so that I can track usage patterns.
Acceptance Criteria: GIVEN user has completed greeting/joke; WHEN program prepares to exit; THEN it writes a record to INTLOG file; AND record contains User ID Name and Timestamp.
